name: Whole Wheat Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together sugar, sifted unbleached flour, whole wheat flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a saucepan, combine butter or margarine, water, and unsweetened cocoa powder. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat and pour into the flour mixture. Mix well with a wooden spoon.
4. Blend in beaten eggs and sour cream, mixing thoroughly.
5. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan. Bake in a preheated oven set to 375 degrees F for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan on a rack. Meanwhile, prepare the cocoa frosting by combining butter, milk, and cocoa powder in a saucepan.
7. Cook over medium heat until butter is melted and mixture is smooth. Stir in sifted confectioners' sugar, cooking until completely dissolved.
8. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract. Frost the cake immediately after baking and cooling completely. Cut into squares.
